# Size

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the AVC decoder configuration atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **AVC decoder configuration record**: A record that configures the AVC decoder.

items.description: A record that configures the AVC decoder.
